mainEntity.name: What if workers' comp denies my ladder fall claim in Sandy Utah?
mainEntity.text: What if workers' comp denies my ladder fall claim in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal denial to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days via Objection form; request mediation or hearing. Common denial reasons: missed deadlines, intoxication, or pre-existing conditions.

suggestedAnswer.text: File objection within 20 days of denial notice. Gather medical records, witness statements, and OSHA ladder safety reports. Many denials overturned on appeal. West Jordan/Sandy firms like Just Work Comp Law handle these routinely. Beware insurer lowball settlements before appeal.

name: Appealing Denied Ladder Fall Claims in Sandy
